header.summary: Review the practitioner's experience, specialties, and availability before you book.

pricing.sessionFeesHint: Pricing is shown before booking and follows your resolved country and currency.

presence.instantDisabled: Instant booking is not enabled yet

availability.heading: Available Times
availability.noSlotsHint: This practitioner has not published available times for the current or next week yet. Please check again later or choose another practitioner.
availability.loadError: Could not load available times right now.
availability.timezoneNote: Times shown in your local timezone.

booking.panelSubtitle: Choose the time that suits you and continue when you're ready.
booking.slotHint: Sign in as a patient to book a slot.
booking.signInNote: Sign in to your patient account to book this slot.
booking.nonPatientNote: Booking is available for patient accounts only.
booking.createError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
booking.createErrorConflict: This time is no longer available. Please choose another available time.
booking.successNote: Your session is reserved for 15 minutes. Complete payment in your sessions page to confirm.

packages.title: Session packages
packages.subtitle: Choose a package to preview the full price, savings, and per-session value with the same booking controls you already use.
packages.empty: Packages are not available for this practitioner right now.

errors.loadFailed: We could not load package pricing right now.
errors.loadFailedHint: Please try again in a moment.
errors.currencyUnavailable: Package pricing is not available in the selected currency.
errors.currencyUnavailableHint: Choose another currency to preview the available package pricing.

flow.title: Choose and book a package
flow.subtitle: Pick a package, select the exact session times, review the quote, and continue to payment.
flow.noSlotsSelected: Choose the session times you want to include in this package.
flow.authNote: You need a patient account to purchase a package.
flow.disabledSubtitle: This practitioner is not accepting package bookings right now.
flow.disabledEmptyNote: You can still continue with normal single-session booking.
flow.reviewNote: Your selected package and session times are ready for payment.
flow.payNote: Use the secure checkout below to pay for your package.
flow.redirectingNote: You are being redirected to secure payment.

errors.authRequired: Sign in as a patient to continue.
errors.slotConflict: One or more selected times are no longer available.
errors.currencyUnavailable: Package pricing is not available in the selected currency.
errors.policyUnavailable: The package refund policy is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
errors.policyRequired: Please accept the package refund policy before continuing.
errors.policyStale: The package refund policy changed. Please review the latest version and accept it again.
errors.policyValidation: We could not validate the package refund policy for this payment. Please try again.
errors.createFailed: We could not create your package purchase. Please try again.
errors.paymentMissingRedirect: Payment was created, but checkout details were not available.
errors.conflict: This package purchase could not be completed right now.
errors.paymentFailed: We could not start payment. Please try again.

trust.title: Public trust signals grounded in real content
trust.description: This section shows currently available public trust signals for this practitioner, along with related reading that can help you choose your next step with more confidence.

rationale.NO_PUBLIC_REVIEWS: No published public reviews are visible yet.
rationale.LOW_PUBLIC_REVIEW_VOLUME: A limited number of public reviews are visible.
rationale.ESTABLISHED_PUBLIC_REVIEW_VOLUME: This profile has an established base of public reviews.
rationale.RECENT_PUBLIC_FEEDBACK: Public feedback has been updated recently.
rationale.PUBLIC_FEEDBACK_NOT_RECENT: Public feedback exists, but it is not very recent.
rationale.NO_PUBLIC_FEEDBACK_TIMELINE: A public feedback timeline is not available yet.

reviews.title: Published public review snippets
reviews.noText: A public rating is available, but this review does not include a public text snippet.

content.title: Related public reading
content.fallbackExcerpt: Open this article to read the full published content and trust metadata.

nextSteps.title: If this feels like a fit, continue with a clear next step
nextSteps.note: You can start guided matching for a more directed path, or keep reading published articles before booking.
